title: No Loading Bar
description: Removes the new loading bar on the world loading screen that appeared in 1.21.9 snapshot 25w31a
body:
Removes the bright green loading bar in the world creation and loading screen.

Loading bars are never representative of the total loading time, and Minecraft already has the interesting visual display of chunks being loaded, which is satisfactory without an extra bar. You can read about it at https://minecraft.wiki/w/Loading_world_screen

With the mod:

![An image of a world loading whilst using the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24d50ad9a904f4fed5baf36cbf4f125a7e649c07_0.webp)

Without the mod:

![An image of a world loading without using the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab19fe5db3943efc994fc6f04f763d2a5898e673.png)
